fieldValues.value: RFC-023: SourceReference vocabulary disjointness — sourceRole replaces relationType

`SourceReference.sourceRole` replaces `relationType` across record/note/typed-record/relations-collection schemas; invariant I-88.

<!-- srs-integration:v1
schema:record.json
schema:note.json
schema:typed-record.json
schema:relations-collection.json
I-88
-->

Renames `SourceReference.relationType` to `sourceRole`, de-collides its enum against the Relation vocabulary, defines the graduation mapping between the two, and adds a permanent disjointness conformance rule. Full text: rfcs/rfc-023-sourceref-vocabulary-disjointness.md.
